metadata.name: Conduct a Physical Fixed Asset Inventory

description: As part of an annual audit, the company needs to perform a physical count of its fixed assets (e.g., laptops, machinery) and compare it to the asset register.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all active assets from the fixed asset register, including asset ID, description, and location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces the complete asset listing.

nodes.task_description: Provide a mobile interface for employees to scan the barcode on each physical asset and confirm its location and condition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a tool that allows for efficient physical counting.

nodes.task_description: Compare the physical count data against the asset register to identify any missing or misplaced assets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a reconciliation report showing 5 missing laptops.

nodes.task_description: Draft the necessary adjustments to write off the missing assets.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent proposes the journal entry to write off the cost and accumulated depreciation of the missing assets.
